nodes.label: AI verifiability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to do the more complicated and crucial tasks myself

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI tends to hallucinate or slightly misinterpret instructions

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I almost always collaborate with the model, sometimes going through multiple iterations

nodes.label: Authenticity of AI-generated content
nodes.grounding_span: I feel a personal approach is still better

nodes.label: AI embellishment vs honest representation
nodes.grounding_span: I have been particularly frustrated with the tendency of most models to embellish

nodes.label: Workplace investment in AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I may have no need of these skills going forward

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: I need to be capable of producing the work I say I can

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and trust
nodes.grounding_span: to be present in the moment with a person and sell the idea well

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it would be incredibly advantageous for me time-wise to give more of my work to AI

nodes.label: Skill mastery and pride
nodes.grounding_span: my skills are a matter of pride

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to double check some of my more extensive spreadsheets

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: AI tends to hallucinate or slightly misinterpret instructions

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: I feel a personal approach is still better

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: I have been particularly frustrated with the tendency of most models to embellish

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: The moment this changes, I'll integrate it fully into my workflow

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: multiple iterations of the same prompt when my wording is unclear

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit evaluation
nodes.grounding_span: I'm a very logical person, so will continue to avoid AI for the complex stuff for as long as I see it as more of a hinderance than a benefit
